title: cyperus ferax var. acicularis
intro: Cyperus ferax var. acicularis, also known as a type of sedge, is a plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cyperus ferax var. acicularis include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in detoxification. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
